core.description: Shared parameters inherited by all mission-specific domains.

atl03x.description: Photon-level data with optional pluggable algorithms (fit, phoreal, yapc, atl24, surface). The most flexible ICESat-2 API.

atl06x.description: Land ice surface elevation segments. Runs the ATL06 algorithm with stricter quality requirements.

atl08x.description: Land and vegetation height segments. Terrain and canopy metrics.

atl13x.description: Inland water surface height. Requires water body identification via name, refid, or coordinate.

atl24x.description: Coastal bathymetry classified photons. Runs ensemble of Median Filter, QTREES, and Coastnet classifiers.

gedil4ax.description: GEDI L4A footprint-level aboveground biomass density (AGBD).
